name: io.github.superserve-ai/mcp
title: Superserve
description: MCP server for Superserve sandboxes: create, exec, and manage Firecracker microVMs

environmentVariables.name: SUPERSERVE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Superserve API key (starts with ss_live_). Create one at https://console.superserve.ai.

environmentVariables.name: SUPERSERVE_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the Superserve control-plane API base URL. Defaults to https://api.superserve.ai.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token — your Superserve API key, e.g. 'Bearer ss_live_...'.
